paragraphs: I'm a Snowflake Data Engineer with ~5 years of experience building production-grade ELT pipelines that power finance, billing, and customer analytics platforms across multiple industries.

At Emburse, I architected a multi-region revenue analytics platform using Fivetran, dbt (Medallion architecture), and Snowflake — achieving less than 1% discrepancy in billing reconciliation across 3 Snowflake regions. At TCS, I spearheaded cost governance initiatives that cut operational spend by 20%. Earlier at Dess Technologies, I built a Customer 360 platform consolidating 100M+ records from 10+ sources, reducing data processing time by 40%.

I hold four Snowflake certifications — including SnowPro Advanced Architect and Data Engineer — and a Master's in Data Science from UMass Dartmouth. I'm passionate about clean data models, reliable pipelines, and making data accessible to the business.
